title: AI & ML Seminar — BVP OPTICA
subtitle: To introduce students to the fundamentals of Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning while demonstrating how AI technologies are applied in real-world industry scenarios.
description: BVP OPTICA organized an interactive seminar featuring Mr. Shivay Lamba, a software developer and GSOC mentor, who delivered an insightful session on AI and ML. The seminar combined theoretical understanding with a live demonstration, where an image-detecting AI model was built in real time using practical tools and techniques.
location: Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering, New Delhi
highlights: Interactive session on AI and ML fundamentals
Live demonstration of building an image-detecting AI algorithm
Discussion on AI applications in major tech companies
Live hands-on AI model creation during the seminar
Expert guidance from a GSOC mentor and industry professional
Practical understanding of ML applications beyond theory
